---
title: "ODS API Testing"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Setup

```{r}

library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(dbplyr)
library(stringr)
library(Microsoft365R)
library(zoo)
library(httr2)
```

```{r}

# returns NA if all values are missing, otherwise returns the minimum non-NA value
min_safe <- function(vec) {
  ifelse(length(vec[!is.na(vec)]) == 0, NA_real_, min(vec, na.rm = TRUE))
}

# flags controlling which incident reporting systems to query
search_nrls <- F
search_lfpse <- T
search_steis <- F

# date range and whether to filter by date of occurrence or date of report
start_date <- "2025-01-01"
end_date <- "2025-04-01"
date_type <- "occurring"

# load database connection settings and column name mappings
source("R/config/connections.R")
source("R/config/column_selection_lookups.R")

# set the date column to filter on, based on date_type above
date_filter <- if (date_type == 'occurring') {
  expr(occurred_date)
} else if (date_type == 'reported') {
  expr(reported_date)
}
```

## Example Query

```{r}

# filter for incidents where A001 contains the value 4
lfpse_categorical <- expr((' ' + A001 + ' ') %LIKE% '% 4 %')

# get the latest revision and earliest submission date for each incident
latest_revision_table <-
  tbl(con_lfpse, in_schema("analysis", "Events")) |>
  group_by(Reference) |>
  summarise(
    Revision = max(Revision),
    reported_date = min(SubmissionDate)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

analysis_table_names <- c(
  "Metadata_Responses",
  "Incident_Responses",
  "Risk_Responses",
  "Outcome_Responses",
  "GoodCare_Responses",
  "EventDetails_Responses",
  "EventTime_Responses",
  "Location_Responses",
  "Events",
  "Patient_Responses",
  "Medication_Responses",
  "Devices_Responses",
  "Reporter_Responses",
  "Governance_Responses",
  # "Findings_Responses",
  "DmdMedication_Responses"
)

# load each table as a remote database reference
# rename EntityId to DmdEntityId in DmdMedication_Responses to avoid clash
analysis_tables <- lapply(analysis_table_names, function(x) {
  table <- tbl(con_lfpse, in_schema("analysis", x))
  if (x == "DmdMedication_Responses") {
    table <- table |> rename(DmdEntityId = EntityId)
  }
  return(table)
})

lfpse_analysis_tables <- c(list(latest_revision_table), analysis_tables)

# join tables on Reference and Revision, keeping rows in the latest revision table
lfpse_parsed <-
  purrr::reduce(
    lfpse_analysis_tables, left_join, by = c("Reference", "Revision")
  ) |>
  rename(occurred_date = T005) |>
  mutate(reported_date = sql('CAST("reported_date" AS DATE)')) |>
  mutate(P004_days = as.numeric(P004))

lfpse_filtered_categorical <- lfpse_parsed |>
  # apply date range filter and the categorical incident type filter
  filter(
    between(date_filter, start_date, end_date),
    lfpse_categorical
  ) |>
  # keep columns specified in the LFPSE rename lookup, plus patient age
  select(any_of(unname(rename_lookup[["LFPSE"]])), P004_days) |>
  # compute the most severe harm scores and patient count per incident
  group_by(Reference) |>
  mutate(
    OT001_min = min(as.numeric(OT001)),
    OT002_min = min(as.numeric(OT002)),
    npatient = max(EntityId)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  # pull the query results from the database into local memory
  collect() |>
  mutate(
    # extract year and month from the chosen date column for aggregation
    year_reported_or_occurred =
      as.numeric(substr(as.character(!!date_filter), 1, 4)),
    month_reported_or_occurred =
      as.numeric(substr(as.character(!!date_filter), 6, 7)),
    # combine into a year-month value
    month_year_reported_or_occurred =
      zoo::as.yearmon(
        str_glue("{year_reported_or_occurred}-{month_reported_or_occurred}")
      ),
    # assign financial year
    financial_year_reported_or_occurred = ifelse(
      month_reported_or_occurred > 3,
      paste0(year_reported_or_occurred, '/', year_reported_or_occurred + 1),
      paste0(year_reported_or_occurred - 1, '/', year_reported_or_occurred)
    ),
    # convert month number to abbreviated name
    month_reported_or_occurred = month.abb[month_reported_or_occurred],
    reported_date = as.character(reported_date),
    occurred_date = as.character(occurred_date),
    # add 1 to psychological harm score so it sits on the same scale as physical harm
    OT002_min_plus_one = OT002_min + 1
  ) |>
  # compute the overall worst harm per row by taking the minimum across both
  # adjusted harm scores, min_safe handles cases where both are NA
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(max_harm = min_safe(c(OT001_min, OT002_min_plus_one))) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    max_harm_level = case_when(
      max_harm == 1 ~ "Fatal",
      max_harm == 2 ~ "Severe harm",
      max_harm == 3 ~ "Moderate harm",
      max_harm == 4 ~ "Low harm",
      max_harm == 5 ~ "No harm"
    ),
    max_physical_harm_level = case_when(
      OT001_min == 1 ~ "Fatal",
      OT001_min == 2 ~ "Severe physical harm",
      OT001_min == 3 ~ "Moderate physical harm",
      OT001_min == 4 ~ "Low physical harm",
      OT001_min == 5 ~ "No physical harm",
      is.na(npatient) ~ "Not applicable",
      .default = "Harm level missing"
    ),
    max_psychological_harm_level = case_when(
      OT002_min == 1 ~ "Severe psychological harm",
      OT002_min == 2 ~ "Moderate psychological harm",
      OT002_min == 3 ~ "Low psychological harm",
      OT002_min == 4 ~ "No psychological harm",
      is.na(npatient) ~ "Not applicable",
      .default = "Harm level missing"
    )
  ) |>
  # drop intermediate columns
  select(-OT001_min, -OT002_min, -OT002_min_plus_one, -max_harm) |>
  # collapse multiple DMD rows per incident into a single row 
  group_by(across(-starts_with("DMD"))) |>
  summarise(
    across(
      starts_with("DMD"),
      ~ str_flatten(., collapse = ", "),
      .names = "{.col}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

## Test ODS API & Request Structure

```{r}
api_key <- Sys.getenv("ods_key")

base_url <- "https://api.service.nhs.uk/organisation-data-terminology-api/fhir"
lookup <- "Organization"
org_code <- "FEQ00"

query <- paste(base_url,lookup, org_code, sep = "/")

req <- request(query) |>
  req_headers(apikey = api_key) |>
  req_perform() 

response <- req |>
  resp_body_json()

response_df <- response |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  janitor::clean_names()

response_df |>
  # select only needed info and shorten variable names
  select('api_org_name' = name) |> 
  pull()
```

## ODS API Function

```{r}

get_ods_orgs <- function(org_code) {
  
  api_key <- Sys.getenv("ods_key")
  
  tryCatch({
    response <- request("https://api.service.nhs.uk/organisation-data-terminology-api/fhir") |>
      req_url_path_append("Organization", org_code) |>
      req_headers(apikey = api_key) |>
      req_throttle(rate = 5) |>
      req_retry(max_tries = 3, backoff = \(x) 2) |>
      req_perform() |>
      resp_body_json()
    
    tibble(
      org_code = purrr::pluck(response, "id",      .default = NA),
      org_name = purrr::pluck(response, "name",    .default = NA),
      org_type = purrr::pluck(response, "extension", 1, "extension", 2,
                              "valueCodeableConcept", "coding", 1, "display",
                              .default = NA),
      country  = purrr::pluck(response, "address", 1, "country", .default = NA)
    )
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(glue::glue("No info available for {org_code}: {e$message}"))
    tibble(org_code = org_code, org_name = NA_character_,
           org_type = NA_character_, country = NA_character_)
  })
}
```

```{r}

# get_ods_orgs <- memoise::memoise(get_ods_orgs)
```

### Test Results

```{r}
get_ods_orgs(org_code = c('FEQ00'))
```

```{r}
org_codes <- c("FEQ00", "RBS")
purrr::map(org_codes, get_ods_orgs, .progress = TRUE) |>
  purrr::list_rbind()
```

### Worked Example

```{r}

org_codes <- lfpse_filtered_categorical |>
  pull(ReporterOrganisationCode) |>
  na.omit() |>
  unique()
```

```{r}

tictoc::tic()

orgs <- purrr::map(org_codes, get_ods_orgs, .progress = TRUE) |> 
  purrr::list_rbind()

tictoc::toc()
```

#### Compare {furrr} Performance

```{r}

tictoc::tic()

workers <- max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1)
future::plan(future::multisession, workers = workers)
    
orgs <- furrr::future_map(org_codes, get_ods_orgs, .progress = TRUE) |>
  purrr::list_rbind()
    
future::plan(future::sequential)

tictoc::toc()
```

#### Join Org Data to Dataset

```{r}

lfpse_filtered_categorical <- 
  lfpse_filtered_categorical |>
  left_join(
    orgs, by = join_by(ReporterOrganisationCode == org_code)
    )
```
